content: Phase 1: VIP plugin works on macOS (no sandbox, only vip_sudo)
guard.py cross-platform: sandbox.in_sandbox() None = pass through
sandbox.py macOS safe fallback: build_bwrap_cmd() returns original cmd
Test plugin loading, slash commands, pre_tool_call hook on macOS
Test vip_sudo approval chain: card → daemon → root
Phase 2: macOS native sandbox via sandbox-exec
Research sandbox-exec SBPL profile: tmpfs home, network control, readonly system
Replace bwrap with sandbox-exec in sandbox.py: platform-detect → sandbox-exec -f profile.sb
Network toggle via SBPL deny network-outbound
End-to-end verification: sandbox-exec equivalence to bwrap
